HEADER.TITLE: Amazon Bedrock Nova
HEADER.SUBTITLE: Generate AI-powered content with Amazon Bedrock

FOOTER.POWERED_BY: Powered by Amazon Bedrock and AWS Amplify

SIGN_UP.TITLE: Create Account
SIGN_UP.PASSWORD_REQUIREMENTS: Password must be at least 8 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and special characters.

CONFIRM.TITLE: Confirm Sign Up
CONFIRM.INSTRUCTIONS: Please enter the verification code sent to your email address.

ERROR.USER_NOT_CONFIRMED: User is not confirmed. Please verify your account.
ERROR.SIGN_IN_FAILED: Sign in failed. Please try again.
ERROR.SIGN_OUT_FAILED: Sign out failed. Please try again.
ERROR.SIGN_UP_FAILED: Sign up failed. Please try again.
ERROR.CONFIRM_SIGN_UP_FAILED: Failed to confirm sign up. Please try again.
ERROR.FORGOT_PASSWORD_FAILED: Failed to send reset code. Please try again.
ERROR.PASSWORD_RESET_FAILED: Failed to reset password. Please try again.

LEGAL.TERMS_NOTICE: By signing up, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

SINGLE_CLIP.TITLE: Single Clip
SINGLE_CLIP.DESCRIPTION: Generate a 6-second video clip from a text prompt with an optional reference image.

AUTOMATED_MULTI_CLIP.TITLE: Automated Multi-Clip
AUTOMATED_MULTI_CLIP.DESCRIPTION: Generate a longer video with multiple scenes automatically created from your comprehensive prompt.

MANUAL_MULTI_CLIP.TITLE: Manual Multi-Clip
MANUAL_MULTI_CLIP.DESCRIPTION: Create a custom video by defining each shot individually with specific prompts and optional images.

PROMPT.LABEL: Prompt
PROMPT.PLACEHOLDER: Describe the video you want to generate...
PROMPT.HELPER: Be detailed and descriptive for best results.

IMAGE.LABEL: Reference Image (Optional)
IMAGE.PLACEHOLDER: Upload an image to guide the video generation

DURATION.LABEL: Duration (seconds)
DURATION.HELPER: Choose a duration between 12 and 120 seconds

ERRORS.IMAGE_FORMAT: Only JPEG and PNG formats are supported
ERRORS.DURATION_RANGE: Duration must be between 12 and 120 seconds

STATUS.TITLE: Job Status
STATUS.NO_JOB: No job selected. Submit a video generation request to get started.

MESSAGES.SUBMITTED: Your job has been submitted and is waiting to be processed.
MESSAGES.PROCESSING: Your video is being generated. This may take a few minutes.
MESSAGES.COMPLETED: Your video has been generated successfully!
MESSAGES.FAILED: There was an error generating your video. Please try again.

JOBS.TITLE: Your Jobs
JOBS.NO_JOBS: You haven't submitted any jobs yet.
JOBS.ERROR: Failed to load jobs. Please try again.

EMAIL.TITLE: Email Notifications
EMAIL.DESCRIPTION: Subscribe to receive email notifications when your video generation jobs are complete.
EMAIL.SUBSCRIBE_ERROR: Failed to subscribe. Please try again.
EMAIL.UNSUBSCRIBE_ERROR: Failed to unsubscribe. Please try again.

EMAIL_SUBSCRIPTION.TITLE: Email Notifications
EMAIL_SUBSCRIPTION.DESCRIPTION: Subscribe to receive email notifications when your video generation jobs are complete.
EMAIL_SUBSCRIPTION.ERROR: Failed to update subscription. Please try again.

NOVA_REEL.TITLE: Nova Reel
NOVA_REEL.DESCRIPTION: Generate professional video reels from text prompts and optional images using Amazon Bedrock's Nova model.

NOVA_IMAGE.TITLE: Nova Image
NOVA_IMAGE.DESCRIPTION: Generate high-quality images from text descriptions using Amazon Bedrock's Nova model.

NOVA_IMAGE.TITLE: Nova Image Generator
NOVA_IMAGE.DESCRIPTION: The Nova Image Generator feature is currently under development. Soon you'll be able to create stunning images from text descriptions using Amazon Bedrock's Nova model.

ERROR_BOUNDARY.TITLE: Something went wrong
ERROR_BOUNDARY.MESSAGE: The application encountered an unexpected error.
